title: 12 Pack Garment Bags 60 x 120cm/6pcs + 60 x 100cm/6pcs, PEVA Translucent Clothes Covers, Garment Covers, Dress Organizer Bags Used To Protect Shirts, Winter Coats, Jackets, Evening Dresses
features: 【Package Include】Clothes Cover Bags Set of 12, 6 pack 60 x 100cm / 24*40inch + 6 pack 60 x 120cm / 24*47inch, suitable for storing various clothing such as shirts,suits,uniforms,jackets and so on.suit for your storage and travel needs.
【PEVA Material】These garment bags are made of PEVA material, which is waterproof, dustproof, tear-resistant and durable. They are also reusable, you can wipe them clean and reuse them many times.

【Translucent Design】garment bags made of PEVA material, translucent design can distinguish the clothes in the bags and find the clothes you need quickly, There is a gap at the top to allow the hanger to extend easily.
【Upgraded Design】 The top arc of our clothing bags is wider to fit the shoulder width of clothing, and the zippers adopt stricter standards to ensure longer durability.

【Business Trips Suit Bag】 Suit bags for clothes storage is specially designed to meet the needs of business travelers, achieving the dual needs of beauty and practicality. Generous space to neatly store business suits, shirts, gowns and ties. The durable material can be reused many times, making it a good helper for business trips.
